title: FCC to review Disney broadcast licenses after Jimmy Kimmel joke about Melania Trump
description: The move comes as the White House pressures Disney-owned ABC to fire Kimmel after he called Melania an "expectant widow".
content:
The US Federal Communications Commission is ordering an early review of Disney's television broadcast licences days after President Donald Trump called for the firing of late-night host Jimmy Kimmel.

title: UK and US always find ways to come together, King Charles to tell Congress
description: Monarch to allude to recent strains in special relationship in speech to both houses during four-day state visit
content:
King Charles is expected to allude to recent strains between the UK and US in a rare address by a monarch to the US Congress as he will underline that “time and again our two countries have always found ways to come together”.

title: Man arrested after sexual assault near M1 services
description: A 59-year-old man has been arrested on suspicion of attempted rape, detectives say.
content:
A man has been arrested after a woman was sexually assaulted near a service station on the M1 in Leicestershire.
Leicestershire Police was called to reports of the assault in Baines Lane - an access road that links Leicester Forest East services with... [360 chars]

title: Former FBI director James Comey charged with threatening Trump's life
description: The indictment stems from a 2025 photo of seashells posted by Comey on social media that the justice department says is a call to violence against Trump.
content:
Former FBI Director James Comey has been charged with threateningthe life of US President Donald Trump, an indictment that stems from an imagehebriefly shared on social media.

title: Virginia Giuffre’s brother criticizes King Charles III for not meeting survivors of Epstein abuse
description: Sky Roberts said survivors ‘still fighting to be heard’ after king, whose brother Andrew was accused of assault by Giuffre, did not meet with them
content:
The brother of the late Virginia Giuffre criticized King Charles III for not meeting with survivors of Jeffrey Epstein’s abuse during his visit to the United States this week.
